[ Quantum computing Accelerate the development of your quantum device. ](https://www.qruise.com/industries/qc)
[ Magnetic resonance Pulse development made easy with our digital twins ](https://www.qruise.com/industries/mri)
[ Quantum sensing Accelerate progress between device iterations ](https://www.qruise.com/industries/quantum-sensing)
Trust yourself
digital twin
Enhance your research with our state-of-the-art digital twin technology.
Our physics-driven algorithms harness the immense power of machine learning to drive forward development and accelerate discovery.
[Book a demo](https://calendly.com/nicu-becherescu/demo) [Contact us](https://www.qruise.com/contact)
###  What our customers say
![Testimonial headshot](https://www.qruise.com/cms/testimonials/fu-berlin/koch.jpg)
Prof. Christiane Koch
Freie Universität Berlin
The Qruise software provided us with a comprehensive digital twin of real quantum hardware; which, along with its full differentiability, has been very useful in our work developing advanced quantum optimal control tools for efficient 2 qubit gates in superconducting qubits.
![Testimonial logo](https://www.qruise.com/cms/testimonials/fu-berlin/logo.png)
![Testimonial headshot](https://www.qruise.com/cms/testimonials/julich/chiani.jpg)
Dr. Alessandro Ciani
Institute for Quantum Computing Analytics (PGI-12) Forschungszentrum Jülich
As a research group active in the field of circuit-QED and optimal control, we are in constant need of efficient methods to carry out numerical simulations for testing our ideas. The Qruise software provides an extensive library of system components, pulse shapes, and optimization algorithms that allow for the fast simulation of quantum systems and the optimization of quantum protocols.
![Testimonial logo](https://www.qruise.com/cms/testimonials/julich/logo.png)
![Testimonial headshot](https://www.qruise.com/cms/testimonials/qm/lior.png)
Dr. Lior Ella
Director of Reasearch at Quantum Machines
I think that this [the Qruise software] reflects a level of ability to understand the physics that honestly I have not seen and published anywhere ... it's a very important collaboration for us ... I believe you are tackling the right problems in the field.
![Testimonial logo](https://www.qruise.com/cms/testimonials/qm/logo.png)
![Testimonial headshot](https://www.qruise.com/cms/testimonials/julich/singh-zeier.png)
Juhi Singh & Dr. Robert Zeier
Forschungszentrum Jülich
The Qruise software includes a wide variety of techniques and tools for quantum optimal control and it is particularly suitable for collaborations with experimentalists. The software is easy to install and learn due to its nicely written documentation. It also helps that it is based on the widely used programming language Python. The Qruise team is quick to respond and to provide support.
![Testimonial logo](https://www.qruise.com/cms/testimonials/julich/logo.png)

[ ![Logo of the company: quantum-machines](https://www.qruise.com/cms/collaborators/quantum-machines-alt.png) ![Logo of the company: quantum-machines](https://www.qruise.com/cms/collaborators/quantum-machines.png) ](https://www.quantum-machines.co/partner-program/)[ ![Logo of the company: fz-juelich](https://www.qruise.com/cms/collaborators/fz-juelich-alt.png) ![Logo of the company: fz-juelich](https://www.qruise.com/cms/collaborators/fz-juelich.png) ](https://www.fz-juelich.de/en/pgi/pgi-12)[ ![Logo of the company: tno](https://www.qruise.com/cms/collaborators/tno-alt.png) ![Logo of the company: tno](https://www.qruise.com/cms/collaborators/tno.png) ](https://www.tno.nl/en/newsroom/insights/2022/11/tno-starts-7-year-quantum-testing/)[ ![Logo of the company: zurich-instruments](https://www.qruise.com/cms/collaborators/zurich-instruments-alt.png) ![Logo of the company: zurich-instruments](https://www.qruise.com/cms/collaborators/zurich-instruments.png) ](https://www.zhinst.com/europe/en/news/zurich-instruments-and-qruise-simplify-qubit-tune-and-operation) [See all](https://www.qruise.com/company/partners)
